name: ESSENTIAL PROPERTIES REALTY TRUST, INC.
business: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. (EPRT) is an internally managed real estate company that acquires, owns, and manages primarily single-tenant properties net leased on a long-term basis to middle-market companies operating service-oriented or experience-based businesses. The company focuses on properties leased to tenants in industries such as car washes, medical/dental services, early childhood education, quick service restaurants, entertainment, automotive services, casual dining, convenience stores, equipment rental, health/fitness, and grocery. As of December 31, 2025, 91.5% of its annualized base rent came from service-oriented and experience-based businesses.

exposures.sentence: We are an internally managed real estate company that acquires, owns and manages primarily single-tenant properties that are net leased on a long-term basis to middle-market companies operating service-oriented or experience-based businesses.

We believe that these businesses have favorable growth potential and, because of their nature, they are more insulated from the competitive pressures presented by e-commerce than many other businesses.
Continue to enhance our cybersecurity risk management program including using third-party experts to facilitate our system penetration testing;

catalysts.event: Remaining tenant construction financing commitment funding
catalysts.sentence: We expect to fund the remaining commitment totaling approximately $114.5 million by December 31, 2026.

Additionally, as of February 6, 2026, we were under contract to acquire 1 property with an aggregate purchase price of $9.6 million, subject to completion of our due diligence procedures and satisfaction of customary closing conditions.

Publish our 2025 Corporate Responsibility Report, aligned with the Sustainability Accounting Standards Board and The Financial Stability Board Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosure indices;
